combined_text_for_llm: Mirror (disambiguation) "For a list of alternative servers which have a copy of Wikipedia, see Wikipedia: Mirrors and forks. Look up mirror, cheval glass, handmirror, or looking glass in Wiktionary, the free dictionary. A mirror is an object whose surface reflects an image.
